title: Scented Soy Candle and Reed Diffuser Gift Box (Bergamot & Oud)
features: Choose from our captivating fragrances, including Bergamot & Oud, Salt Wood & Sage, Sweet Charm, Velvet Peony & Oud, Clary Sage & Mandarin, or Lavender & Mandarin, each creating a unique and enchanting atmosphere.
Premium Soy Candle: Immerse yourself in the warm glow of our 30cl soy-based candle. Crafted with care, the candle offers a clean and eco-friendly burn, ensuring a longer-lasting, aromatic experience.

Chic Black and Gold Reed Diffuser: Enhance your surroundings with the stylish black and gold reed diffuser included in this luxurious gift box. The sleek design adds a touch of sophistication to any room, while the reeds delicately disperse the Lavender and Mandarin fragrance, creating a continuous, subtle ambiance.

Perfect Gift: Packaged in an elegant box adorned with the signature Wild Orchid logo, this gift set is ready to be presented to someone special or enjoyed as a personal indulgence. Whether it's a birthday, anniversary, or just a thoughtful gesture, the Wild Orchid Luxury Scented Gift Box is sure to leave a lasting impression.
